name: Cherry Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an 8-inch square cake pan by greasing and flouring it.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Drain the water-packed cherries.
4. Measure 1 cup of drained cherries and set aside.
5. In a blender, puree together 1/2 cup sweet milk and 1/2 cup packed dates.
6. Blend in the oil, egg yolks, and applesauce. Set aside with the cherries.
7. In a small bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff; set aside.
8. In a large bowl, combine the flours, dry milk, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices. Stir well.
9. Gradually mix in the blended liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients until well moistened.
10. Gently stir in the cherries.
11. Fold in the egg whites just until combined.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
13. Cool the cake to room temperature.
14. Refrigerate, covered.
Yield Variation: Substitute 1 cup fresh sliced strawberries for cherries. Per serving: 160 calories, 1 bread, 1 fruit, and 1 fat exchange.
